topic: OpenAI launches GPT-5 with record-breaking capabilities

audio_script.text: Mind blown! OpenAI just launched something HUGE!
audio_script.speaker: narrator_male

audio_script.text: Say hello to GPT-5, OpenAI's most powerful AI model yet, crushing professional benchmarks.
audio_script.speaker: narrator_male

audio_script.text: This is massive! It's surpassing human experts in medicine, law, coding, you name it!
audio_script.speaker: narrator_male

audio_script.text: Funding? A whopping 40 billion dollars, rocketing OpenAI’s value to 300 billion dollars.
audio_script.speaker: narrator_male

audio_script.text: Follow for more business news, you don't want to miss this!
audio_script.speaker: narrator_male

visual_script.prompt: OpenAI logo with an explosion effect
Visuals of medicine, law, and coding symbols
Animated bar chart showing funding growth
Dynamic 'Follow' button with business news icons
